description: MetaBuff session-start hooks — auto-inject Superpowers methodology and skill context on session initialization

SessionStart.description: Runs at the start of every coding session to inject Superpowers methodology and cross-session memory

commands.name: load-superpowers-methodology
commands.description: Load Superpowers methodology skills into session context

commands.name: load-known-issues
commands.description: Load inter-session memory from previous sessions

commands.name: load-tdd-iron-law
commands.description: Load TDD Iron Law for enforcement during implementation

PreImplementation.description: Runs before any implementation phase — enforces brainstorming gate for complex tasks

commands.name: enforce-brainstorming-gate
commands.description: Ensure design document exists before implementation for complex tasks

PreFinish.description: Runs before session completion — enforces finishing workflow

commands.name: enforce-finishing-workflow
commands.description: Verify tests, typecheck, and structured completion before ending
